issues.detail: Not all error scenarios and edge cases are explicitly covered.
Minor platform assumptions such as shell environment variable syntax may not work on Windows.

scenarios.name: Add Postgres and run Prisma migrations
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chains railway status, railway add --database postgres, railway variable list to confirm DATABASE_URL, railway run npx prisma migrate deploy to apply migrations with injected env vars, and railway redeploy; baseline knows railway add and railway up but copies DATABASE_URL manually and skips the railway run env-injection step.

scenarios.name: CI deploy with health check and rollback
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses railway up --detach with RAILWAY_TOKEN, polls the health URL with curl until 200 or timeout, and calls railway rollback on failure; baseline writes a generic curl polling loop, runs railway up without --detach, and does not surface railway rollback as the recovery command.
